Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wilduck Burger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's too crowded right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Mystery Burger - 1,000 yen[n]The ingredients are a secret!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eating the burger might help me[n]gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the night here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"{f 0 1 2}Saturday and Sunday nights{f 0 1 27} only![n]Weekend Wilduck Set - 1,200 yen[n]What's inside? Find out for yourself!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like the limited set meal is[n]available on Saturday and Sunday nights.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Nighttime Only - The Wilduck Burger Big[n]Eater Challenge is underway! 1,800 yen"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...As Elizabeth mentioned, there[n]is a food challenge at night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still order the Mystery Burger...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still order the[n]Weekend Wilduck Set...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's the Promised Day...[n]I should head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wilduck Burger[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I order...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mysterious food with[n]unknown ingredients.[n]Raises {f 4 30 2 1 0 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A notorious challenge[n]even famous competitors[n]surrender to.[n]{f 1 1}
